select_when: Complexity is blocking action, alignment, or recall more than it is improving the underlying decision.
The team needs the essential governing idea, not the full story of every analysis branch that produced it.
A recommendation must survive handoff to operators who need a clear rule, intent, or checkpoint rather than expert nuance.
avoid_when: Simplification would remove the caveat, boundary, or uncertainty that makes the decision safe to use in reality.
The case depends on expert nuance or accuracy levels that cannot be safely compressed into a short governing rule.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model anchored to complexity reduction for action and handoff, not donor communication-style breadth.
donor_drops: Dropped donor persuasion and AI-persona examples that widened the model beyond the raw simplification boundary.
Dropped donor higher-order relation overlays because batch 2 preserves the frozen first-order contract.
open_questions: The reasoning-types field is especially normalization-heavy here because the raw source describes function more clearly than taxonomy.

select_when.note: The raw file explicitly states when simplification helps; donor drafts were only used as weak support before narrowing to action and handoff structure.

avoid_when.note: The first avoid condition is explicit and the second is a conservative extension of the same raw over-simplification risk.

input_type.note: The source clearly applies to complex recommendations crossing a handoff boundary, but the typed input is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The raw model distills to the essential governing idea; the output label compresses that function into a reusable operational type.

reasoning_types.note: The source supports the functional role more clearly than any exact reasoning taxonomy, so this field remains a relatively weak reviewed normalization.
